fields.label: Attribute
fields.description: The attribute this option belongs to

fields.label: Option Value
fields.description: Internal value used in code/data (e.g., red, blue, small, medium)

fields.label: Option Label
fields.description: Display label shown to users (e.g., Red, Blue, Small, Medium)

fields.label: Is Default
fields.description: If checked, this option will be selected by default

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.description: Order in which options appear (lower numbers first)

fields.label: Color Code
fields.description: Hex color code for color-type attributes (e.g., #FF0000)

fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Icon class for visual display (e.g., fa fa-circle)

fields.label: Image
fields.description: Image for visual selection (e.g., color swatch, size chart)

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Additional description or tooltip for this option

fields.label: External Code
fields.description: External system code for integration (e.g., ERP code, marketplace code)
